content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Mar 27, 2026)
## OVERVIEW 
Today's development focused on a critical bug fix in the message service, ensuring proper extraction of action parameters from LLM outputs. Two new pull requests were opened, addressing streaming callback consolidation and dependency updates.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

### Message Service Bug Fixes
- Resolved an issue where the message service failed to extract action parameters from standalone XML blocks when actions were provided in a comma-separated format, leading to dropped parameters. ([#6692](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6692))

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
- [#6690](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6690) proposes a fix to consolidate `StreamChunkCallback` and remove a dual-extractor, which is currently causing TTS garbling.
- [#6689](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6689) is a chore to bump the `npm_and_yarn` group across one directory with two updates, likely related to dependency management.

## CLOSED ISSUES
No issues were closed today.

## NEW ISSUES
No new issues were reported today.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
No active issues with more than 3 comments.
